case_title: OFELIA DEL PRADO MALIMBAN VS. EILEEN HOYT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALIMBAN, OFELIA DEL PRADO AS TO DEFENDANT HOYT, EILEEN AN INDIVIDUAL HOYT DOLAN, MARY M AKA MARY HOYT, TRUSTEE,  AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
